SELECT COUNT(c.*) / NULLIF(CAST((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM store_sales) AS FLOAT), 0) AS fk_violation_ratio FROM store_sales c LEFT JOIN store p ON c.ss_store_sk = p.s_store_sk WHERE p.s_store_sk IS NULL AND c.ss_store_sk IS NOT NULL

SELECT COUNT(c.*) / NULLIF(CAST((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM store_sales) AS FLOAT), 0) AS fk_violation_ratio FROM store_sales c LEFT JOIN item p ON c.ss_item_sk = p.i_item_sk WHERE p.i_item_sk IS NULL AND c.ss_item_sk IS NOT NULL

SELECT COUNT(c.*) / NULLIF(CAST((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM store_sales) AS FLOAT), 0) AS fk_violation_ratio FROM store_sales c LEFT JOIN customer p ON c.ss_customer_sk = p.c_customer_sk WHERE p.c_customer_sk IS NULL AND c.ss_customer_sk IS NOT NULL

SELECT COUNT(c.*) / NULLIF(CAST((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM catalog_sales) AS FLOAT), 0) AS fk_violation_ratio FROM catalog_sales c LEFT JOIN item p ON c.cs_item_sk = p.i_item_sk WHERE p.i_item_sk IS NULL AND c.cs_item_sk IS NOT NULL

SELECT COUNT(c.*) / NULLIF(CAST((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM web_sales) AS FLOAT), 0) AS fk_violation_ratio FROM web_sales c LEFT JOIN item p ON c.ws_item_sk = p.i_item_sk WHERE p.i_item_sk IS NULL AND c.ws_item_sk IS NOT NULL

SELECT COUNT(c.*) / NULLIF(CAST((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM store_returns) AS FLOAT), 0) AS fk_violation_ratio FROM store_returns c LEFT JOIN item p ON c.sr_item_sk = p.i_item_sk WHERE p.i_item_sk IS NULL AND c.sr_item_sk IS NOT NULL

SELECT COUNT(c.*) / NULLIF(CAST((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM catalog_returns) AS FLOAT), 0) AS fk_violation_ratio FROM catalog_returns c LEFT JOIN item p ON c.cr_item_sk = p.i_item_sk WHERE p.i_item_sk IS NULL AND c.cr_item_sk IS NOT NULL

SELECT COUNT(c.*) / NULLIF(CAST((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM web_returns) AS FLOAT), 0) AS fk_violation_ratio FROM web_returns c LEFT JOIN item p ON c.wr_item_sk = p.i_item_sk WHERE p.i_item_sk IS NULL AND c.wr_item_sk IS NOT NULL

SELECT COUNT(c.*) / NULLIF(CAST((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM customer) AS FLOAT), 0) AS fk_violation_ratio FROM customer c LEFT JOIN customer_address p ON c.c_current_addr_sk = p.ca_address_sk WHERE p.ca_address_sk IS NULL AND c.c_current_addr_sk IS NOT NULL

SELECT COUNT(c.*) / NULLIF(CAST((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM inventory) AS FLOAT), 0) AS fk_violation_ratio FROM inventory c LEFT JOIN warehouse p ON c.inv_warehouse_sk = p.w_warehouse_sk WHERE p.w_warehouse_sk IS NULL AND c.inv_warehouse_sk IS NOT NULL
SELECT COUNT(r.d_date_sk) / NULLIF(CAST(COUNT(*) AS FLOAT), 0) AS join_coverage_ratio FROM store_sales l LEFT JOIN date_dim r ON l.ss_sold_date_sk = r.d_date_sk
SELECT COUNT(r.d_date_sk) / NULLIF(CAST(COUNT(*) AS FLOAT), 0) AS join_coverage_ratio FROM catalog_sales l LEFT JOIN date_dim r ON l.cs_sold_date_sk = r.d_date_sk
SELECT COUNT(r.d_date_sk) / NULLIF(CAST(COUNT(*) AS FLOAT), 0) AS join_coverage_ratio FROM web_sales l LEFT JOIN date_dim r ON l.ws_sold_date_sk = r.d_date_sk
